title: AIS Agent Catalog
description: JSON Schema 2020-12 for agent-catalog.yaml. Each entry describes one agent in the Agentic Engineering Framework including its autonomy level, capabilities, tool allowlist, and output contract. Reference: framework.md section 4.

catalog_version.description: Catalog version string (semver). Increment when adding or removing agents.

last_updated.description: ISO-8601 date when the catalog was last updated.

AgentEntry.description: Definition of a single agent in the framework.

name.description: Unique machine-readable agent name in kebab-case (e.g., 'architecture-agent', 'qa-test-agent').

display_name.description: Human-readable display name (e.g., 'Architecture Agent', 'QA and Test Agent').

role.description: The agent's primary functional role within the framework.

description.description: One-to-three sentence description of what this agent does, what it owns, and what it must not do.

autonomy_level.description: Default autonomy level for this agent. May be overridden per-activity in governance-registry.yaml.

max_autonomy_level.description: Maximum autonomy level this agent is permitted to reach in any activity.

capabilities.description: List of high-level capability descriptions. Plain English statements of what this agent can do.

allowed_tools.description: Explicit allowlist of tool IDs this agent is permitted to invoke. Agents must not invoke tools not on this list.

prohibited_actions.description: Explicit list of actions this agent must never perform, regardless of autonomy level or instructions.

requires_approval.description: If true, this agent's outputs require human approval before they become authoritative. Overridden by governance registry entries.

approval_role.description: Default role or GitHub team that must approve this agent's outputs when requires_approval is true.

outputs.description: List of artifact types this agent produces.

process_steps.description: AIS Specify lifecycle steps this agent participates in.

source_prompt.description: Relative path to the canonical source prompt for this agent in .specify/prompts/.

agent_file.description: Relative path to the generated agent definition file in .github/agents/.

enabled.description: Whether this agent is active. Set false to disable without removing the entry (feature flag).

experimental.description: If true, this agent is under experiment and may change without notice.

specialties.description: Optional list of technology or domain specialties. Generic agents should minimize this list.

governance_entries.description: List of governance registry entry IDs that govern this agent's activities.

notes.description: Free-form notes, outstanding constraints, or implementation guidance.
